hero_subtitle: SFTY Business gives exchange executives a unified compliance operating view that reduces manual workload while preserving audit trails and supporting scalable risk control.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: As exchanges grow, compliance workflows multiply without clear coordination across teams and providers. This leads to duplicated effort, slower reviews and limited executive visibility into operational risk and audit readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, case workflows, regulatory rules and audit evidence into a unified compliance operating view that helps exchanges scale without adding manual overhead or operational risk.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to compliance control
workflow_description: SFTY structures provider checks through risk rules, case creation, decision logs and audit evidence to support scalable and auditable exchange compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One compliance view
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides exchange executives a provider-neutral layer that connects compliance workflows, preserves audit evidence, and delivers scalable risk visibility without adding manual complexity.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides exchanges with a controlled compliance layer that preserves audit evidence, orchestrates providers and supports scalable deployment for clear bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support scaling exchange compliance workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows reduce manual compliance handoffs
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports bank due diligence
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how regulatory rule monitoring aids compliance scalability
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for exchange executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides exchange executives a connected compliance control layer to improve risk visibility, streamline workflows and enable scalable, audit-ready compliance operations across digital asset activities.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY reduce manual compliance work?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured workflows, routes and case management to reduce duplicated checks and manual handoffs in compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages to support audit readiness and enable clear traceability of compliance decisions and operational actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into one operational compliance layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but sits above them, structuring their outputs into workflows, decisions, regulatory updates, and reporting.
final_title: Scale exchange compliance with one control layer
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs, regulatory rules and cases into audit-ready workflows for scalable exchange compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
